name: ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc.
business: ConnectM delivers AI-enabled electrification, distributed energy, mobility, and Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) solutions to customers worldwide through six reportable segments. The company's proprietary platform aggregates operational data from over 120,000 connected assets to provide predictive maintenance, energy optimization, and asset performance insights. It serves residential, commercial, industrial, and OEM customers across electrification, solar, battery storage, EV fleet management, and last-mile logistics.

exposures.sentence: ConnectM operates a proprietary, AI-driven data and intelligence platform that monitors, analyzes and manages connected assets across their full lifecycle.
The VCU can execute analytical processes at the electric vehicle, where data is collected via smart devices and IoT sensors, and transfer processed data to the cloud instead of sending only raw data.

The VCU can interface with additional sensors and actuators on a vehicle like GPS, temperature, tire-pressure, theft detection, ignition line and motor mode control, for taking actions at the edge or enabling the End User to control using a connected application.
Keen Labs subsequently introduced its Hi-C and Hi-E energy storage product lines, targeting high-power and long-duration distributed energy storage markets, respectively.

Keen Labs serves as ConnectM's dedicated product development and data-science hub, focused on building AI-powered solutions that enable virtual power plants (VPPs), intelligent building systems, and connected mobility and logistics networks.

Distributed Energy & Renewables (DER) – Solar and distributed energy solutions for commercial, residential, consumer, and industrial customers in India, including project development, EPC services and ongoing energy management.
Transportation – ConnectM develops connected hardware and software for OEMs and fleet operators focused on EV management, battery diagnostics, and predictive analytics.
Through its subsidiary DeliveryCircle LLC, ConnectM operates in the rapidly growing last-mile delivery market, providing dispatch, brokerage, and delivery-management software.

In March 2026, the Company acquired Harry Kahn Associates, Inc. (HKA), an 80-year-old defense contractor specializing in mission-critical technical data systems and lifecycle support for U.S. military platforms.

Corporate & Strategic Assets – Corporate-level operations and the Geo Impex India landholding, an approximately 76-acre site near Chatrapur, Odisha, India approved for development into a multimodal logistics park and AI-enabled data center campus.
In November 2025, the Company acquired certain assets of Amperics Holdings LLC... consisting solely of proprietary technology related to nanotechnology-based energy storage.

catalysts.event: Formation of Keen Labs technology subsidiary
catalysts.sentence: On October 27, 2025, the Company announced the formation of Keen Labs Operations LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary established to consolidate and expand our AI and technology operations.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Amperics nanotechnology energy storage assets
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025, we entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement with Amperics Holdings LLC... pursuant to which we acquired certain assets related to Amperics nanotechnology-based energy-storage business.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of control of Geo Impex (logistics park and data center campus)
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025, we acquired control of Geo Impex through an Exchange and Acquisition Agreement.

catalysts.event: Distribution agreement with Greentech Renewables for heat pumps
catalysts.sentence: On November 10, 2025, the Company announced it had entered into a distribution agreement with Greentech Renewables... for the sale and distribution of the Company's Keen-branded high-efficiency heat pumps and related smart controls.

catalysts.event: First Home and Building Electrification project award in India
catalysts.sentence: On March 26, 2025, the Company was awarded its first Home and Building Electrification (HBE) project in India through a strategic partnership with a local energy services provider.

catalysts.event: Equity investment in Sun Solar and related agreements
catalysts.sentence: On January 5, 2026, the Company entered into an acquisition agreement to acquire a 40% equity interest in Sun Solar LLC... in exchange for 15,000,000 shares of the Company's common stock.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Harry Kahn Associates (defense contractor)
catalysts.sentence: On March 10, 2026, the Company completed the acquisition of Harry Kahn Associates, Inc. (HKA), a defense-focused technical data development company, in exchange for 400,000 shares of the Company's common stock.
In January 2026, Greentech placed a follow-on order of approximately $865,000.
In February 2026, an additional order of approximately $1,000,000.

tamClaims.claim: Total annual addressable market for Owned Service Network and Managed Solutions: $1.7 trillion (430M homes and light commercial buildings at average $3,850/yr)
tamClaims.sentence: With an average annual expenditure of approximately $3,850 per space for equipment purchase, maintenance, and energy operation, the total annual addressable market is estimated at approximately $1.7 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: Serviceable addressable market for Owned Service Network and Managed Solutions (New England, Mid-Atlantic, South Atlantic): $40 billion
tamClaims.sentence: These regions collectively contain approximately 46.8 million homes and 1.68 million light commercial buildings, representing a combined market opportunity of roughly $40 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Serviceable obtainable market for HVAC and solar installation in Massachusetts, Virginia, Florida: $12 billion
tamClaims.sentence: The serviceable obtainable market for HVAC and solar installation services in Massachusetts, Virginia, and Florida is estimated at $12 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Transportation segment total addressable market (EV fleet management and battery diagnostics): $14 billion in 2024
tamClaims.sentence: The global total addressable market for ConnectM's transportation business that focuses on EV fleet management and battery diagnostics is estimated at approximately $14 billion in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Transportation segment serviceable addressable market (US, India, Middle East): $5.5 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The Company estimates these markets represented an aggregate SAM of approximately $5.5 billion in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Transportation segment serviceable obtainable market (EV and battery diagnostics OEMs in India): $150 million in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The serviceable obtainable market for ConnectM's transportation business consists of EV and battery diagnostics OEMs in India. The Company estimates this market opportunity to be approximately $150 million in 2025 and beyond.

tamClaims.claim: Logistics total addressable market (last-mile delivery): approximately $150 billion, projected to reach $260 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The TAM for last-mile delivery services is currently estimated at approximately $150 billion... projected to reach approximately $260 billion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Logistics serviceable addressable market (US and Canada): $43.8 billion in 2023
tamClaims.sentence: The SAM for last-mile delivery services in the United States and Canada is estimated at approximately $43.8 billion in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Logistics serviceable obtainable market (freight last-mile delivery in US): $20 billion
tamClaims.sentence: The SOM for last-mile delivery of freight goods (such as palletized items) in the United States is estimated at approximately $20 billion.
